cases.prompt_body: Upward view inside the Kansas City Hyatt Regency atrium, second- and fourth-floor suspended walkways stacked in frame, bronze railings and warm hotel light, the fourth-floor box-beam connection and twin hanger rods clearly visible, the upper connection visibly carrying both walkway loads in a way the elegant structure should not, pre-collapse stillness
